title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Death of Ur-Namma
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Death of Ur-Namma.
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Death of Ur-Namma.

translation.text: From 'The Death of Ur-Namma': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
